chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 846 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.7140/2023 (C/A) 15.02.2024 M/s Ali Gul Abbasi and Muhammad Zohaib Azam Rajput, Advocates for petitioners/applicants. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Abdul Waqar Channa (IGP Sindh Office, Karachi) and SIP Ali Murad Narejo (SSP Office, Khairpur)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has filed a statement along with certain documents including a letter dated 22.01.2024, addressed to DIGP Establishment, CPO Sindh, Karachi by three senior police officials, and submits that this is the enquiry report. Learned Counsel, in view of above, does not press this application and submits that he would avail remedy in accordance with law against this enquiry report by either raising objections before IGP Sindh or challenging it before the relevant forum. Accordingly, listed application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
